roles.title: Research Assistant
roles.topic: Agentic AI and Text2SQL for financial applications
roles.details:
- Conduct research on Agentic AI, focusing on how large language models plan and perform actions.
- Study state-of-the-art **Text2SQL** methods and explore their applications in the financial sector under limited resource conditions.

roles.title: Research Assistant
roles.topic: Learning analytics and educational data mining
roles.details:
- Analyzed student behavior on online learning platforms to understand its impact on final learning outcomes.
- Researched data mining approaches to detect and collect Vietnamese lectures available across global online platforms.
